_instructions: For every entry below, fill in TWO fields: "example_en" and "example_pt". "example_en" is ONE natural, everyday English sentence that illustrates the use of that specific verb form — it MUST reflect the SUBJECT (person) and the TENSE/ASPECT. "example_pt" is a faithful EUROPEAN Portuguese (Portugal, not Brazil) translation of that same sentence, and it MUST naturally contain the exact given "form". Keep both short and concrete. Do not change any field other than "example_en" and "example_pt"; leave the structure, order, and all "form" values exactly as they are. Return the whole JSON object with every pair filled.

_guidance.variety: European Portuguese (Portugal). Use natural pt-PT phrasing (e.g. 'estar a correr' rather than 'estar correndo').

subjunctive_prefixes.future_subjunctive: quando / se (when / if ..., about the future)

tense_usage.present_indicative: Habitual action or general truth, or something happening now.
tense_usage.preterite: A single completed, bounded action in the past.
tense_usage.past_imperfect_indicative: Ongoing, repeated, or background past action: 'was ...-ing' or 'used to ...'.
tense_usage.present_subjunctive: Subjunctive triggered by wish, doubt, emotion, or necessity — usually a 'that ...' clause. Show the trigger.
tense_usage.future_subjunctive: A future condition or 'when/if ...' clause about the future (specific to Portuguese).
tense_usage.conditional: The 'would' form — the result of a hypothetical.
tense_usage.past_pluperfect: Synthetic pluperfect ('had ...-ed'), the literary one-word form.
tense_usage.future_indicative: Simple future ('will ...'), the one-word synthetic form.
tense_usage.imperative_affirmative: A command ('Do it!'). No first-person singular.
tense_usage.imperative_negative: A negative command ('Don't do it!'). No first-person singular.
tense_usage.personal_infinitive: Portuguese inflected infinitive, e.g. 'para eu ser ...' / 'antes de saíres'.
tense_usage.past_participle: Invariable participle used in an example (e.g. an adjective or 'ter ...-ido').
tense_usage.present_participle: The gerund; in pt-PT usually 'a + infinitive' ('estou a correr').
